summary.zh: 技能 / VFX 工作台,管理一款游戏的技能与特效产出。它浏览游戏里的 skills/* 与 vfx/* 文件,内置一套 VFX 引擎实时预览特效效果,并用 skill:generate-vfx 生成新特效。玩家在面板里手点调整,与 AI dispatch 共改同一份 skill spec,做到技能树与打击感特效一处编辑、所见即所得。
summary.en: The skill & VFX workbench, managing a game's skills and effects. It browses the game's skills/* and vfx/* files, previews effects live in a built-in VFX engine, and generates new ones via skill:generate-vfx. Players tweak by hand in the panel while AI dispatch edits the same shared skill spec, so the skill tree and game-feel effects are edited in one place, WYSIWYG.

body.zh:
浏览 skills/* 与 vfx/* 产出
内置 VFX 引擎实时预览
skill:generate-vfx 生成特效
body.en:
Browse skills/* and vfx/* outputs
Live preview in a built-in VFX engine
Generate effects via skill:generate-vfx

body.zh: 玩家手点与 AI dispatch 共改一份 skill spec
body.en: Player clicks and AI dispatch edit one shared skill spec

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 左侧打开「skill」面板
body.en: Enable in Admin → open the 'skill' panel

notes.zh: 首版:技能 / VFX 工作台
